'''Denn Wessex''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and one of the first to be appointed to the rank of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]], or regional governor.

==Biography==
Wessex served as a [[Commander/Legends|commander]] aboard the [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Redoubt]]'' during the [[Battle of Boz Pity (Clone Wars)|Battle of Boz Pity]] ([[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]]). His courage under [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] fleet fire made him a hero. Soon after, he married [[Lira Wessex/Legends|Lira Blissex]], a chief designer of the '' Venator''-class.

When [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] [[Declaration of a New Order|declared]] his [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], Wessex was made [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] of the [[Relgim Oversector]] and assumed the role of commander of the [[Ninth Army]].<ref name="TEGTW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>
